title: Detect and warn appropriately on intentional latches

features.name: latch modeled with nonblocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a latch implemented using nonblocking assignment (<=) inside an always block with conditional logic

features.name: latch sensitivity list with multiple signals
features.description: Code should include an always block with a latch-style sensitivity list containing multiple signals separated by 'or'

features.name: nonblocking assignment in conditional latch block
features.description: Code should include a nonblocking assignment inside a conditional branch within a latch-style always block
